title: Golden Bat
description: Golden Bat is a fun and silly mod. It add a new artifact the golden bat rarely found in labyrinths. The bat send your foe either long or while crouching up high. Be mindfully when using it near glass or other easily break
body:
### Summary
Golden Bat is a fun and silly mod inspired by @scarycakes suggestion. It add a new artifact the golden bat rarely found in labyrinths. The bat send your foe either long or while crouching up high. Be mindfully when using it near glass or other easily breakable blocks.

### Features
- Infinity durable golden bat rare found in Labyrinths.
- Normally Golden bat has high knockback, sending your enemies on far voyage.
  - While Crouch to send your enemies up high.
- Breaks glass, flowers, cacti, sugarcane and pumpkins very easily.
  - Flower leave dye behind.
  - Pumpkin leaves seeds behind.
  - The rest just get deleted.
  - This works with Activator too.
- Rightclicking the golden bat allows the player to dash a short distance (5 second cooldown).
